The '''TIE Experimental M2''', also known as the '''TIE BigGun''', was an experimental member of the [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] and a part of the [[TIE Experimental Project]].

==Characteristics==
One of the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] built by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] research project led by [[Director/Legends|Director]] [[Lenzer]] under the command of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]], the M2 was essentially a standard [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] but with the original chin-mounted [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] removed and a pair of [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] turrets mounted on the outer wing hubs.<ref name="XWA" />

The fighter was roughly as fast as the standard TIE/LN, but its maneuverability was slightly lower. Like the other TIE Experimentals, the M2 was remotely controlled by a modified [[Beta-class ETR-3 escort transport|''Beta''-class ETR-3 escort transport]].<ref name="XWA" />

==History==
The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] initially encountered the M2 when a [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighter]] group patrolled too close to one of their bases. Little is known about this incident, which may indicate the total destruction of the B-wing group. In order to gain more intelligence on the remote-controlled TIE project, [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Yamarus]] ordered a decoy convoy of [[MB-C1 medium transport]]s and [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] to draw out the Experimentals and their control craft.<ref name="XWA" />

The lure was successful, and the Z-95's, armed with experimental [[ion pulse]] warheads, managed to disable or destroy the entire Imperial attack force. The TIEs were examined in detail, but the life-support systems on the control craft were rigged to malfunction as soon as the transports were disabled.<ref name="XWA" />

Shortly thereafter, the Alliance gained intelligence that led them to the main TIE Experimental production facility, and the M2s were among the fighter screen defending the hangar ship ''[[Sardis]]'' and [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Obsidian (XQ1 Platform)|''Obsidian'']].<ref name="XWA" />

After the destruction of space platform ''Obsidian'', no TIE Experimental fighters were seen again.<ref name="XWA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
